contribution_control_limits_check.name: contribution_control_limits_check
contribution_control_limits_check.value:
"contribution_control"."subject_limit_15m" > 0
        and "contribution_control"."subject_limit_day" >= "contribution_control"."subject_limit_15m"
        and "contribution_control"."network_limit_15m" > 0
        and "contribution_control"."network_limit_day" >= "contribution_control"."network_limit_15m"
        and "contribution_control"."unavailable_min_sources" >= 2
        and "contribution_control"."projection_window_hours" between 1 and 168

contribution_moderation_decisions_shape_.name: contribution_moderation_decisions_shape_check
contribution_moderation_decisions_shape_.value:
("contribution_moderation_decisions"."decision" = 'reverse' and "contribution_moderation_decisions"."prior_decision_id" is not null)
        or ("contribution_moderation_decisions"."decision" in ('approve', 'reject') and "contribution_moderation_decisions"."prior_decision_id" is null)

contribution_projections_price_check.name: contribution_projections_price_check
contribution_projections_price_check.value:
(
          "contribution_projections"."state" = 'available'
          and "contribution_projections"."price_min" is not null
          and "contribution_projections"."price_min" > 0
          and "contribution_projections"."price_kind" in ('Exact', 'Range')
          and (
            ("contribution_projections"."price_kind" = 'Exact' and "contribution_projections"."price_max" is null)
            or ("contribution_projections"."price_kind" = 'Range' and "contribution_projections"."price_max" is not null and "contribution_projections"."price_max" > "contribution_projections"."price_min")
          )
        )
        or (
          "contribution_projections"."state" = 'unavailable'
          and "contribution_projections"."price_kind" is null
          and "contribution_projections"."price_min" is null
          and "contribution_projections"."price_max" is null
          and "contribution_projections"."unavailable_source_count" >= 2
        )
        or (
          "contribution_projections"."state" = 'conflict'
          and (
            ("contribution_projections"."price_kind" is null and "contribution_projections"."price_min" is null and "contribution_projections"."price_max" is null)
            or (
              "contribution_projections"."price_min" is not null
              and "contribution_projections"."price_min" > 0
              and "contribution_projections"."price_kind" in ('Exact', 'Range')
              and (
                ("contribution_projections"."price_kind" = 'Exact' and "contribution_projections"."price_max" is null)
                or ("contribution_projections"."price_kind" = 'Range' and "contribution_projections"."price_max" is not null and "contribution_projections"."price_max" > "contribution_projections"."price_min")
              )
            )
          )
        )

observations_contribution_claim_check.name: observations_contribution_claim_check
observations_contribution_claim_check.value:
"observations"."admission_id" is null
      or (
        "observations"."provenance" = 'observed'
        and "observations"."moderation_status" = 'pending'
        and (
          ("observations"."availability_state" = 'available' and "observations"."price_amount" is not null and "observations"."price_amount" > 0)
          or ("observations"."availability_state" = 'unavailable' and "observations"."price_amount" is null)
        )
      )

public_food_candidates_claim_check.name: public_food_candidates_claim_check
public_food_candidates_claim_check.value: ("public_food_candidates"."raw_price" is not null and length(trim("public_food_candidates"."raw_price")) > 0) or ("public_food_candidates"."raw_availability" is not null and length(trim("public_food_candidates"."raw_availability")) > 0)

public_food_candidates_survey_period_che.name: public_food_candidates_survey_period_check
public_food_candidates_survey_period_che.value: "public_food_candidates"."survey_period_start" is null or "public_food_candidates"."survey_period_end" is null or "public_food_candidates"."survey_period_start" <= "public_food_candidates"."survey_period_end"

public_food_candidates_place_precision_c.name: public_food_candidates_place_precision_check
public_food_candidates_place_precision_c.value: "public_food_candidates"."geographic_precision" not in ('exact_place', 'market') or "public_food_candidates"."normalized_place_id" is not null

public_food_candidates_area_precision_ch.name: public_food_candidates_area_precision_check
public_food_candidates_area_precision_ch.value: "public_food_candidates"."geographic_precision" not in ('neighbourhood', 'lga') or "public_food_candidates"."normalized_area_id" is not null

public_food_candidates_ready_check.name: public_food_candidates_ready_check
public_food_candidates_ready_check.value: "public_food_candidates"."candidate_status" <> 'ready_for_review' or ("public_food_candidates"."normalized_item_id" is not null and "public_food_candidates"."normalized_item_variant_id" is not null and ("public_food_candidates"."raw_unit" is null or "public_food_candidates"."normalized_unit_id" is not null) and ("public_food_candidates"."raw_quantity" is null or "public_food_candidates"."quantity_value" is not null) and ("public_food_candidates"."raw_price" is null or ("public_food_candidates"."price_kobo" > 0 and "public_food_candidates"."currency" = 'NGN')) and ("public_food_candidates"."raw_availability" is null or "public_food_candidates"."availability" <> 'unknown') and "public_food_candidates"."geographic_precision" <> 'unknown' and "public_food_candidates"."source_geographic_scope" is not null and length(trim("public_food_candidates"."source_geographic_scope")) > 0 and ("public_food_candidates"."observed_at" is not null or ("public_food_candidates"."survey_period_start" is not null and "public_food_candidates"."survey_period_end" is not null)))

public_food_candidates_relationship_chec.name: public_food_candidates_relationship_check
public_food_candidates_relationship_chec.value: ("public_food_candidates"."related_candidate_id" is null and "public_food_candidates"."relationship_classification" is null and "public_food_candidates"."relationship_reason" is null) or ("public_food_candidates"."related_candidate_id" is not null and "public_food_candidates"."relationship_classification" in ('repeated_publication', 'syndicated_copy', 'revised_source', 'independent_corroboration', 'superseded_extraction') and "public_food_candidates"."relationship_reason" is not null)

public_ingestion_runs_counts_check.name: public_ingestion_runs_counts_check
public_ingestion_runs_counts_check.value: "public_ingestion_runs"."sources_scheduled" >= 0 and "public_ingestion_runs"."sources_fetched" >= 0 and "public_ingestion_runs"."captures_added" >= 0 and "public_ingestion_runs"."candidates_added" >= 0 and "public_ingestion_runs"."candidates_ready_for_review" >= 0 and "public_ingestion_runs"."duplicates_suppressed" >= 0 and "public_ingestion_runs"."rejected_count" >= 0

public_source_captures_survey_period_che.name: public_source_captures_survey_period_check
public_source_captures_survey_period_che.value: "public_source_captures"."survey_period_start" is null or "public_source_captures"."survey_period_end" is null or "public_source_captures"."survey_period_start" <= "public_source_captures"."survey_period_end"

public_source_registry_active_approval_c.name: public_source_registry_active_approval_check
public_source_registry_active_approval_c.value: "public_source_registry"."lifecycle_state" <> 'active' or ("public_source_registry"."permitted_ingestion_mode" = 'fetch_and_stage' and "public_source_registry"."approval_reference" is not null and "public_source_registry"."reviewed_by" is not null and "public_source_registry"."reviewed_at" is not null)

presence_activation_requests_status_chec.name: presence_activation_requests_status_check
presence_activation_requests_status_chec.value:
("presence_activation_requests"."status" = 'accepted' and "presence_activation_requests"."lease_id" is not null and "presence_activation_requests"."failure_code" is null)
        or ("presence_activation_requests"."status" in ('rejected', 'expired') and "presence_activation_requests"."failure_code" is not null)

presence_capabilities_state_check.name: presence_capabilities_state_check
presence_capabilities_state_check.value:
("presence_capabilities"."state" = 'active' and "presence_capabilities"."revoked_at" is null)
        or ("presence_capabilities"."state" in ('revoked', 'consumed') and "presence_capabilities"."revoked_at" is not null)

presence_control_allowlist_check.name: presence_control_allowlist_check
presence_control_allowlist_check.value:
("presence_control"."allowlist_account_a" is null and "presence_control"."allowlist_account_b" is null)
        or ("presence_control"."allowlist_account_a" is not null and "presence_control"."allowlist_account_b" is not null
          and "presence_control"."allowlist_account_a" <> "presence_control"."allowlist_account_b")

presence_control_retention_check.name: presence_control_retention_check
presence_control_retention_check.value:
("presence_control"."wave_retention_seconds" is null or "presence_control"."wave_retention_seconds" between 1 and 900)
        and ("presence_control"."report_retention_seconds" is null or "presence_control"."report_retention_seconds" between 86400 and 31536000)

presence_control_responder_check.name: presence_control_responder_check
presence_control_responder_check.value:
("presence_control"."safety_responder_account_id" is null and "presence_control"."safety_backup_account_id" is null)
        or ("presence_control"."safety_responder_account_id" is not null and "presence_control"."safety_backup_account_id" is not null
          and "presence_control"."safety_responder_account_id" <> "presence_control"."safety_backup_account_id")

presence_control_budgets_check.name: presence_control_budgets_check
presence_control_budgets_check.value:
"presence_control"."activation_limit_15m" > 0 and "presence_control"."activation_limit_day" >= "presence_control"."activation_limit_15m"
        and "presence_control"."snapshot_limit_minute" > 0 and "presence_control"."snapshot_limit_15m" >= "presence_control"."snapshot_limit_minute"
        and "presence_control"."disclosure_limit_15m" between 1 and 50
        and "presence_control"."wave_limit_minute" > 0 and "presence_control"."wave_limit_15m" >= "presence_control"."wave_limit_minute"
        and "presence_control"."wave_limit_day" >= "presence_control"."wave_limit_15m"
        and "presence_control"."report_limit_15m" > 0 and "presence_control"."report_limit_day" >= "presence_control"."report_limit_15m"

presence_leases_expiry_check.name: presence_leases_expiry_check
presence_leases_expiry_check.value:
"presence_leases"."expires_at" > "presence_leases"."issued_at"
        and "presence_leases"."expires_at" <= "presence_leases"."issued_at" + interval '15 minutes'
        and ("presence_leases"."revoked_at" is null or "presence_leases"."revoked_at" >= "presence_leases"."issued_at")

presence_preferences_name_check.name: presence_preferences_name_check
presence_preferences_name_check.value:
("presence_preferences"."name_consented" and "presence_preferences"."display_name" is not null)
        or (not "presence_preferences"."name_consented" and "presence_preferences"."display_name" is null)

presence_rate_buckets_window_check.name: presence_rate_buckets_window_check
presence_rate_buckets_window_check.value:
"presence_rate_buckets"."window_seconds" between 1 and 86400
        and "presence_rate_buckets"."request_count" >= 0
        and "presence_rate_buckets"."expires_at" >= "presence_rate_buckets"."window_started_at" + ("presence_rate_buckets"."window_seconds" * interval '1 second')

presence_reports_details_check.name: presence_reports_details_check
presence_reports_details_check.value: "presence_reports"."details" is null or length("presence_reports"."details") between 1 and 1000

presence_reports_resolution_check.name: presence_reports_resolution_check
presence_reports_resolution_check.value:
("presence_reports"."resolution" = 'open' and "presence_reports"."resolved_at" is null)
        or ("presence_reports"."resolution" = 'closed' and "presence_reports"."resolved_at" is not null and "presence_reports"."resolved_at" >= "presence_reports"."created_at")
